match.name: 19th Match
match.venue: Bharat Ratna Shri Atal Bihari Vajpayee Ekana Cricket Stadium, Lucknow

Gujarat Titans_vs_Lucknow Super Giants_2.live_score: LSG 164/8 (20 ov) & GT 78/1 (8.4 ov) — GT need 87 runs in 68 balls.
Gujarat Titans_vs_Lucknow Super Giants_2.live_bowling: Mohammed Shami 0/30 (3), Prince Yadav 0/15 (2), Digvesh Rathi 1/12 (2)
gemma_observations: Buttler is looking to attack the loose deliveries outside off-stump.
Shami is bowling a disciplined line, preventing easy scoring opportunities.
Buttler is attempting to accelerate his scoring rate through aggressive drives.
Buttler is increasingly looking to attack and clear the boundaries.
Shubman Gill is rotating the strike effectively against Shami.
GT are prioritizing singles and twos, conserving their wickets.
